text.title: Architect Skill Index Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the index file shape, the per-lens entry record, and the quarterly refresh artefact.

section.title: Required index file fields

list.item: last_refreshed_utc (ISO date; checked by quarterly cadence)

section.reference: Authoritative index file with all 5 lenses.

list.item: note: one sentence framing for an architect reader
added_in_refresh_utc: when the entry first appeared in the index
candidates_added (array; methodologies new in geek/sdlc-ai/ since last refresh)
decisions (array of {candidate_path, decision: included | deferred | rejected, lens, rationale})

antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Cap is 6; overflow goes to deeper_reading.

antipattern.description: Entry path that does not resolve to a real folder under the knowledge tree.
reading_order entries with no position numbers OR same position used twice.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. Order is the value.

antipattern.description: last_refreshed_utc older than 100 days at validation time.

list.item: Every entry path exists in the knowledge tree.
Quarterly refresh artefact committed alongside the index update.
